0101001001001001 1100100001101001 1 -> sum: 0001101010110011, cout: 1
0110101010001111 0100100000011001 1 -> sum: 1011001010101001, cout: 0
1010011010101000 1001011010111111 0 -> sum: 0011110101100111, cout: 1
1110110111101010 1000110100100011 1 -> sum: 0111101100001110, cout: 1
1100011011011000 1000110100111101 0 -> sum: 0101010000010101, cout: 1
1110010110010001 1101111101011110 1 -> sum: 1100010011110000, cout: 1
0000000000000000 0000000000000000 0 -> sum: 0000000000000000, cout: 0
1111111111111111 1111111111111111 1 -> sum: 1111111111111111, cout: 1
0000000000000000 1111111111111111 0 -> sum: 1111111111111111, cout: 0

0111111111111111 1000000000000001 1 -> sum: 0000000000000001, cout: 1
